title: To Marigolds.
content:
Give way, and be ye ravish'd by the sun,
    And hang the head whenas the act is done,
    Spread as he spreads, wax less as he does wane;
    And as he shuts, close up to maids again.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "To Marigolds."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
